title: Prisma Cloud Remediation - AWS EC2 Security Group Misconfiguration
content:
This playbook remediates the Prisma Cloud AWS EC2 alerts generated by the following policies:
 - AWS Default Security Group Does Not Restrict All Traffic
 - AWS Security Group allows all traffic on SSH port (22).

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (PrismaCloud, xsoar-supported).

Inputs — policyId: Provides the Prisma Cloud policy Id..

Integrations/scripts used: IsIntegrationAvailable, aws-ec2-describe-security-groups, aws-ec2-revoke-security-group-ingress-rule, isError.
